product_overview: CogniStruct is an AI-powered learning platform for school students (Class 6–10) that generates chapter structures, explanations, mind maps, flashcards, quizzes, and provides a context-aware doubt-solver — all via a single authenticated serverless API.
core_goals: Enable students to create and explore structured learning chapters generated by AI tailored to their grade.
Provide multiple study aids (explanations, mind maps, flashcards, quizzes, active-recall) to improve retention and mastery.
Offer a safe, subject-aware conversational doubt-solver while enforcing authentication, rate limits, and CORS constraints.
Persist user content and progress in Supabase with Row-Level Security and surface leaderboard/community features.
Send timely push notifications (OneSignal) for social interactions while validating inputs and environment configuration.

features.name: JWT Authentication Middleware
features.description: All requests to /api/gemini must include a valid Supabase JWT Bearer token. The server verifies the token via supabase.auth.getUser(token) and rejects unauthorized requests.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization: Bearer <valid_supabase_jwt> and body {"action":"explain", ...} -> Receive 200 with AI response {"text":"<markdown explanation>"}
POST /api/gemini without Authorization header -> Receive 401 {"error":"Unauthorized"}

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: Per-user in-memory rate limiter allowing 20 requests per 60-second window keyed by authenticated user ID; returns 429 when exceeded.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt> (20th request within 60s) and valid body -> Receive 200 with expected AI response
POST /api/gemini with Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt> (21st request within same 60s window) and valid body -> Receive 429 {"error":"Too many requests. Please wait a moment."}

features.name: CORS Enforcement
features.description: Server accepts requests only from configured origins (ALLOWED_ORIGIN, VERCEL_URL, VERCEL_BRANCH_URL; localhost in dev). Preflight OPTIONS handled on /api/gemini.
user_flows: OPTIONS /api/gemini with Origin header set to an allowed origin -> Receive 200 OK with CORS headers
POST /api/gemini with Origin header set to an unknown origin -> Receive 403 {"error":"Origin not allowed"}

features.name: Chapter Explanation
features.description: Generates a full AI explanation of a chapter in markdown with LaTeX support; configurable length and depth.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"explain","chapterTitle":"Linear Equations","concepts":"two variables, substitution","length":"STANDARD","depth":"INTERMEDIATE"} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<markdown explanation>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body missing action -> Receive 400 {"error":"Missing action"}

features.name: Chapter Generation
features.description: Generates a structured learning chapter (5–8 concepts) from a topic and student level, returning JSON with titles, estimatedMinutes and prerequisites.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-chapter","topic":"Photosynthesis","level":"Class 8"} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<JSON chapter object>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-chapter","level":"Class 8"} (missing topic) -> Receive 400 {"error":"Missing topic"}

features.name: Mind Map Generation
features.description: Generates a hierarchical mind map JSON structure for a chapter with nodes including id, title, description, parentId and type.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-mindmap","chapterTitle":"Newton's Laws","complexity":"ADVANCED","detail":"DETAILED"} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<JSON mindmap>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-mindmap","chapterTitle":"Newton's Laws","complexity":"UNKNOWN","detail":"BRIEF"} -> Receive 400 {"error":"Invalid complexity"}

features.name: Active Recall Question Generation
features.description: Produces a single conceptual active-recall question for a given concept — short and direct, no multiple choice.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-question","conceptTitle":"Conservation of Energy","context":"chapter summary"} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<question string>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-question","conceptTitle":"","context":"chapter summary"} -> Receive 400 {"error":"Missing conceptTitle"}

features.name: Flashcard Generation
features.description: Generates exactly 5 flashcards for a chapter; each flashcard contains a front (question/term) and back (answer/explanation).
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-flashcards","chapterTitle":"Fractions","concepts":["adding fractions","simplifying"]} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<JSON array of 5 flashcards>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-flashcards","chapterTitle":"Fractions","concepts":[]} -> Receive 400 {"error":"At least one concept is required"}

features.name: Quiz Generation
features.description: Generates 1–5 quiz questions of types MCQ (4 options), FIB, MATCH (3 pairs), or MIXED. MCQ answers are full option text.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-quiz","chapterTitle":"World War I","concepts":["assassination of Franz Ferdinand","trench warfare"],"quizType":"MCQ","count":5} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<JSON array of QuizQuestion>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"generate-quiz","chapterTitle":"World War I","concepts":[],"quizType":"MCQ","count":10} -> Receive 400 {"error":"count must be between 1 and 5"}

features.name: Doubt Solver Chat
features.description: Conversational AI tutor handling subject-specific doubts with context-aware responses; keeps max 20 messages in history and rejects inappropriate/vulgar messages.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"doubt","history":[{"role":"user","content":"How do I solve quadratic equations?"}],"context":"Class 9, chapter: Quadratic Equations"} -> Receive 200 {"text":"<AI response>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"doubt","history":[],"context":"Class 9"} -> Receive 400 {"error":"No message to respond to."}

features.name: Push Notification Sending
features.description: Sends a OneSignal push notification to a target user ID (UUID v4). Validates UUID and only proceeds if OneSignal env vars are configured; otherwise skips silently.
user_flows: POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"send-notification","targetUserId":"3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6","title":"Friend Request","message":"You have a new friend request"} and OneSignal env configured -> Receive 200 {"text":"<OneSignal response JSON>"}
POST /api/gemini with Authorization and body {"action":"send-notification","targetUserId":"not-a-uuid","title":"Hi","message":"Test"} -> Receive 400 {"error":"Invalid targetUserId."}

features.name: JWT Authentication Middleware
features.description: Every request to /api/gemini must include a valid Supabase JWT Bearer token. Server verifies token via supabase.auth.getUser(token). Returns 401 for missing or invalid tokens.

endpoints.description: Global auth gate — all actions share this endpoint. Unauthorized requests rejected before action routing.

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: In-memory rate limiter keyed by authenticated user ID. Allows 20 requests per 60-second window per user. Resets on cold start.

endpoints.description: Rate limit enforced after JWT verification. Returns 429 when limit exceeded.

response_schema.429: {"error":"Too many requests. Please wait a moment."}

features.name: CORS Enforcement
features.description: Restricts cross-origin requests to a Set of allowed origins derived from ALLOWED_ORIGIN, VERCEL_URL, VERCEL_BRANCH_URL env vars. Falls back to localhost:3000 in dev. Rejects requests from unknown origins.

features.name: Chapter Explanation
features.description: Generates a full AI explanation of a chapter with configurable length and depth. Uses Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite. Returns markdown text with LaTeX math support.

features.name: Chapter Generation
features.description: Generates a structured learning chapter with 5-8 concepts from a topic and level. Returns JSON with title, subject, and concept array including estimatedMinutes and prerequisites.

features.name: Mind Map Generation
features.description: Generates a hierarchical mind map JSON structure for a chapter. Returns rootTitle and nodes array with id, title, description, parentId, and type fields.

features.name: Active Recall Question Generation
features.description: Generates a single conceptual active recall question for a concept. Short, direct, no multiple choice.

features.name: Flashcard Generation
features.description: Generates exactly 5 flashcards for a chapter. Each card has front (question/term) and back (answer/explanation).

features.name: Quiz Generation
features.description: Generates a quiz with 1-5 questions of type MCQ (4 options), FIB (fill-in-blank), MATCH (3 pairs), or MIXED. MCQ answer is full option text, FIB answer is the word/phrase, MATCH answer is empty string.

features.name: Doubt Solver Chat
features.description: Conversational AI tutor. Handles subject-specific doubts with context-aware responses. User context passed in conversation history (not system instruction) to prevent prompt injection. Inappropriate/vulgar messages in any language rejected with polite redirect. Identity questions answered as CogniStruct made by Manthan.

features.name: Push Notification Sending
features.description: Sends a OneSignal push notification to a target user. targetUserId validated as UUID v4. Requires VITE_ONESIGNAL_APP_ID and ONESIGNAL_REST_API_KEY env vars. Silently skips if not configured.

known_limitations.issue: In-memory rate limiter resets on Vercel cold start
known_limitations.impact: Rate limit window resets on each cold start; not persistent across function instances

known_limitations.issue: No server-side profanity filtering on text inputs
known_limitations.impact: Client-side profanity filter can be bypassed by direct API calls; AI system instruction handles vulgar chat messages but profile fields are only filtered client-side

known_limitations.issue: Supabase anon key used for JWT verification
known_limitations.impact: Intended by design; anon key is safe to use server-side for auth.getUser()
